General.Name: WMCH Global Investment Ltd
General.Description: WMCH Global Investment Limited, an investment holding company, provides civil and structural engineering consultancy services for residential, industrial, commercial, and institutional projects in Singapore, Vietnam, Malaysia, and Indonesia. It also provides master planning, structural due diligence, and visual inspection services of existing buildings; and geotechnical engineering consultancy services. In addition, the company engages in the holding of investment property. WMCH Global Investment Limited was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in North Point, Hong Kong.
General.Address: 148 Electric Road, North Point, Hong Kong
